description_long: This object consists of three personal care products from the Aveeno brand, specifically the Dermexa range. The set includes a white plastic bottle with a blue cap, a rectangular cardboard box, and a white squeeze tube with a blue cap. The bottle and tube both feature printed labels with blue and beige text and graphics, while the box displays similar branding and product information. The bottle is slightly curved with a flat base, the tube is cylindrical and tapers towards the cap, and the box is a standard rectangular prism. Subtle graphic elements, such as a stylized oat illustration, are visible on all three items, contributing to a clean and clinical appearance. These items are typically found in urban environments such as pharmacies, bathrooms, or personal bags.
description: A set of three Aveeno Dermexa lotion products: a white bottle with blue cap, a rectangular box, and a white squeeze tube with blue cap, all featuring clean branding and subtle oat graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bottle, box, and tube side by side, with all branding and graphics clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the tube in front, showing the blue cap and the box behind, partially obscuring the bottle.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the tube, box, and bottle arranged left to right, all labels and graphics visible.
description_view_3: Back view with the bottle behind the box and the tube, showing the tops and caps of each item.
